notes: payment_verifier is the binding circuit (5 public signals): it verifies the Groth16/BN254 proof on-chain AND enforces that the public signals for the commitment, recipient, and settlement tx equal the recorded values. Initialized with the new verification key. Validated on testnet (proof_id 0, verified=true). Supersedes CB6LJ2YR (3-signal, range-only). anchor_registry is unchanged.
